name: UI Design Agent
description: Retrieves design assets from Figma (REST API) and Google Stitch (MCP): file metadata, pages, nodes, project screens, and screen images.

skills.name: Figma File Metadata
skills.description: Fetches high-level metadata for a Figma file: name, last modified, version.

skills.name: Figma File Pages
skills.description: Lists all pages (canvases) in a Figma file.

skills.name: Figma Page Fetch
skills.description: Fetches node data for a specific named page in a Figma file (fuzzy match).

skills.name: Figma Node / Element Spec
skills.description: Fetches the design spec (size, colour, typography, layout constraints) for a specific node or element by its Figma node ID. Use this when a development agent needs the precise spec of a UI element.

skills.name: Stitch Project Metadata
skills.description: Fetches metadata for a Google Stitch design project via MCP.

skills.name: Stitch Screen Design
skills.description: Fetches design and generated code for a specific screen in a Google Stitch project via MCP.

skills.name: Stitch Screen Image
skills.description: Fetches the image preview for a specific screen in a Google Stitch project via MCP.
